description.en: Fast indicative pricing with UK postcode and Turkey city—not a binding offer; use the main quote page for a written quotation.

keyword.en: ballpark freight estimate UK postcode, quick indicative quote Turkey city, non-binding rate preview

text.en:
Brand and SEO separation: This page targets the United Kingdom to Turkey (UK→TR) lane. For Turkey-origin shipping to Europe/UK, use Han Bros Cargo on hanbroscargo.com; each domain uses distinct keywords and corridor messaging.

Clear commodity, volume and date window shorten turnaround.
